notes.scope: Manual rules only. Auto-generated rules from ClearURLs are merged separately at build time. All params here are NOT covered by ClearURLs globalRules or provider-specific rules as of 2026-03-11.
notes.priority_model: Global rules = priority 1. Domain-specific = priority 2. Path-specific = priority 3. Higher number wins in DNR.

id_ranges.60000-60999: Strict mode — domain-specific (manual, includes affiliate params)

notes.skipped_reason: Path transforms (e.g. /ref= path segment removal) not supported by Declarative Net Request; handle via optional webRequest fallback.

normal_rules._comment: === GLOBAL SUPPLEMENTS — params missed by ClearURLs globalRules ===
=== AMAZON — supplements to ClearURLs amazon rules ===
=== ALIEXPRESS — supplements to ClearURLs aliexpress rules ===
=== EBAY — supplements to ClearURLs ebay rules ===
=== ETSY — supplements to ClearURLs (ClearURLs does not cover etsy) ===
=== WALMART — supplements to ClearURLs walmart rules ===
=== MICROSOFT / BING / OUTLOOK — not in ClearURLs ===
=== NETFLIX — supplements ClearURLs netflix (adds missing params) ===
=== BESTBUY — ClearURLs has no bestbuy rules ===
=== TARGET — ClearURLs has no target rules ===
=== THE VERGE / VOX MEDIA — not in ClearURLs ===
=== CROWDTANGLE / META CONTENT LIBRARY — not in ClearURLs ===

strict_rules._comment: === STRICT GLOBAL SUPPLEMENTS — includes affiliate IDs, click IDs, all referral marketing ===
=== STRICT ALIEXPRESS — includes aff_* affiliate params ===
=== STRICT EBAY — includes campid, customid, mkrid, mkcid ===
=== STRICT ETSY — includes click_key, click_sum (affiliate params) ===
=== STRICT WALMART — includes affilsrc, affp1, irgwc, u1 ===
=== STRICT APPLE — includes pt (affiliate partner token) ===
=== STRICT BOOKING.COM — includes aid and label (affiliate identifiers) ===
